title: Unused life-saving pill
summary: The protagonist once obtained a rare pill that can keep him alive in a near-death moment. He has not used it yet.
notes: Senior Brother does not know this pill exists.

title: Old injury flare-up
summary: The protagonist's old injury worsens quickly after high-intensity combat and affects both movement and judgment.
notes: The protagonist habitually hides the severity.

title: Refusal to owe life-debts again
summary: The protagonist has privately vowed not to keep surviving by accepting rescue and debt from others, which drives his resistance to help.
notes: This is a key emotional source of his resistance.
